productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Caroni Black Flip Flop
description: Style Noteflip flops have been in vogue since time immemorial. The adidas Caroni, true to its name, will add a stylish touch to your beach style and have a good grip, are comfortable, and can be worn with almost any casual staple. Product DetailsBlunt toed flip flop in green and black with synthetic thong style straps Print on the footbedSoft foamy rubber footbedSingle piece rubber outsole that has herringbone lugsMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
